reforms.description: The federal government announced a cash grant program totaling $350 million annually to encourage exploration and development by small and medium-sized oil and gas companies in Western Canada, projected to generate significant investment and job creation.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The program is expected to stimulate investment in the oil and gas sector, leading to job creation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The federal government provides cash grants totaling $350 million a year.
reforms.importance_rationale: This initiative represents a significant investment in the startup ecosystem of the oil and gas sector, with potential for substantial economic impact through job creation and increased investment.
reforms.source_quote: Federal Government provides cash grants totalling $350 million a year to encourage exploration and development by mostly small and medium-sized oil and gas companies in Western Canada.
